description_long: This machine gun features a robust, blocky construction with a rectangular receiver and a prominent, squared-off barrel assembly. The body is composed of angular, geometric shapes, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. The stock is solid and straight, extending from the rear in a fixed position, while the grip and trigger area are integrated into the lower section of the receiver. A box-shaped magazine is visible beneath the central body, suggesting a high-capacity feed system. The surface is uniformly dark gray, with a matte finish that reduces glare. There are no visible iron sights or mounting mechanisms, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design.
description: A blocky, industrial-style machine gun with a fixed stock, box magazine, and matte dark gray finish. The design is angular and utilitarian, lacking visible sights or mounting hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared-off barrel and the symmetrical, blocky profile of the receiver.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the machine gun, including the fixed stock, box magazine, and angular grip area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the solid stock and the rectangular shape of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine and overall length.
attribute_barrel_type: standard rectangular barrel with no visible cooling features
attribute_stock_design: fixed blocky stock with straight, angular profile
